summary.en: Leading Chinese AI company with GLM series models and strong academic background.
summary.zh: 领先的中国 AI 公司，提供 GLM 系列模型，具备强大的学术背景。

title.en: Zhipu AI API Key - GLM Series Chinese Models | Get Model Key
title.zh: 智谱AI API Key - GLM 系列中国模型 | Get Model Key

description.en: Get Zhipu AI API key for GLM series models. Access GLM-4, GLM-4V and CodeGeeX with strong Chinese capabilities.
description.zh: 获取智谱AI API Key，访问 GLM 系列模型。使用 GLM-4、GLM-4V 和 CodeGeeX，具备强大的中文能力。

benefit.en: New users may receive around 20M tokens, typically valid for about 3 months (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 新用户可获约 2000 万 Token（约 3 个月有效，具体以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: Backed by a strong academic background and generous onboarding incentives; GLM-4 models fit coding and bug-fixing workflows well.
notes.zh: 团队学术背景扎实，活动力度较大；GLM-4 系列在代码编写和缺陷排查场景表现突出。
